name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 17 Feb 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with PayPal Checkout transactions that could result in discrepancies between the payment and order grand total. Developers continue to prioritise monitoring this important issue."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue that with shipping validation that prevented checkout with postcode 819454 Singapore."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
